title: Open Integration Center/ Integration Recipe from board view
excerpt: It will be a lot convenient if there was a way to trigger a recipe from board view itself or at least open the recipe page in a modal or anything that will link the board view to the recipe or automation center.

posts.author: Prabesh (prabesh)
posts.cookedHtml: It will be a lot convenient if there was a way to trigger a recipe from board view itself or at least open the recipe page in a modal or anything that will link the board view to the recipe or automation center.
